message:
fix(test): use dynamic port in ServerModeFailsWithoutServer test

The test hardcoded port 39999 assuming nothing would listen there,
but a Dolt server process can bind that port. Use net.Listen on :0
to find a guaranteed-free port instead.

Fixes: bd-caofi1

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
